restaurant_openings.name: What’s Old Is New Again at the Resurrected Riggsby in D.C.
restaurant_openings.summary: The Riggsby, chef Michael Schlow’s cult-favorite American restaurant that enjoyed a popular pre-pandemic run in Dupont before it closed in 2019, resurfaced this week in the same Northwest neighborhood. Now tucked inside the 335-room Royal Sonesta Hotel (2121 P Street NW), regulars can expect about 60 percent of the same menu they grew to love, […]

events_calendar.name: 17 Things to Do in DC and Beyond to Celebrate America’s 250th
events_calendar.summary: “America’s State Flowers” location_onUS Botanic Garden languageWebsite Stop and smell the roses—plus the magnolias, orchids, bluebonnets, and saguaro cactus blossoms—at this outdoor display of official flowers from each US state and territory. Through October 12. “America’s Presidents” location_onNational Portrait Gallery languageWebsite The newly updated exhibit offers more than 1,730 likenesses of American Presidents and […] The post 17 Things to Do in DC and Beyond to Celebrate America’s 250th first appeared on Washingtonian .
